career_direction.core_strength: Commercial growth — finding opportunities, pitching them, closing them, using both marketing channels and direct relationship-building
career_direction.long_term_track: BD Executive > BD/Partnerships Manager > Head of Partnerships > Commercial Director
career_direction.near_term_priority: Structured roles with mentorship, clear progression, and earning potential. Desk-friendly and remote/hybrid compatible.
career_direction.environment: Agencies, mid-size companies, or large corporates. No early-stage startups without support structures.

work_setup.hard_filter: None. Do NOT exclude any work setup. All are acceptable. Priority order is used for ranking matched jobs, not for filtering them out.
work_setup.note: Office-based and hybrid roles are fully acceptable. The priority order helps rank results when multiple roles are otherwise equal — it is not a dealbreaker at any level.

search_parameters.contract_type: Permanent only. No fixed-term, freelance, or commission-only.
search_parameters.industries: All industries. No exclusions. Industry-agnostic to maximise volume.

hard_dealbreakers: Roles explicitly requiring visa sponsorship that cannot be provided
Pure cold-calling / telesales roles (outbound-only with no strategic or account management component)
Roles titled Marketing Assistant, Marketing Intern, or any title below Executive level

soft_flags.office_based: NOT a hard dealbreaker. Include in results but flag for review. Flexibility can often be negotiated during or after the interview process.

tier_notes.tier_1: Apply aggressively. Best fit, strongest earning potential, clearest progression.
tier_notes.tier_2: Apply if right fit. Worth pursuing if company offers strong progression, flexibility, or culture fit.
tier_notes.growth_marketing_manager_note: Some companies use Manager loosely at entry level — include if JD matches experience level.

high_priority: business development executive OR account executive OR partnerships executive OR new business executive OR client development
marketing executive OR demand generation OR campaign executive OR growth executive
medium_priority: account coordinator OR account manager junior OR client services executive OR commercial executive
marketing coordinator OR digital marketing executive OR CRM executive OR email marketing executive
low_priority: sales and marketing coordinator OR brand partnerships OR community partnerships OR growth marketing

system_notes.flexibility_negotiation: Do not hard-filter office-based roles. Flag for review rather than rejecting.
system_notes.right_to_work: Answer is Yes. No dates, visa types, or renewal details in any application.
system_notes.agency_variant: Fifth CV variant (Agency/Account Management) exists for agency/account roles.
system_notes.industry_tailoring: Fashion/retail and healthcare covered by direct experience. Tech and financial services lean on economics degree and data/analytics skills.
system_notes.probation_risk: Prioritise companies mentioning onboarding, L&D, or career development. These are retention-focused employers.
